title: India’s private sector growth slows to over 3-year low in March, weighed down by Mideast conflict
summary_full: India's private-sector business activity, which had been on an upswing since the start of 2026, falters in March due to shockwaves from the Iran war
summary_public: India's private-sector business activity, which had been on an upswing since the start of 2026, falters in March due to shockwaves from the Iran war
